ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "fide_id" TEXT /* FIDE ID of the player */,
  "uscf_id" TEXT /* USCF ID of the player */,
  "current_title" TEXT /* Current title of the player (e.g., GM, IM, FM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance metrics are recorded (e.g., 2023-May) */,
  "classical_rating" INTEGER /* Classical rating of the player */,
  "classical_games" INTEGER /* Number of classical games played by the player */,
  "rapid_rating" INTEGER /* Rapid rating of the player */,
  "rapid_games" INTEGER /* Number of rapid games played by the player */,
  "blitz_rating" INTEGER /* Blitz rating of the player */,
  "blitz_games" INTEGER /* Number of blitz games played by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric record was last updated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the player across all game types */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the player across all game types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., classical, rapid, blitz) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tournament record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tournament record was last updated */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, Swiss) */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control of the tournament (e.g., 90+30, 10+5) */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the player in the tournament (e.g., 1st place, 2nd place) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participation record was last updated */,
  "points_scored" REAL /* Number of points scored by the player in the tournament */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_participation_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_participation_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., player profile, tournament result) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_bios" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biographical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "bio_text" TEXT /* Biographical information of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the biographical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the biographical record was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_bios_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rating entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the rating is recorded (e.g., 2023-May) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., classical, rapid, blitz) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player for the specified period and game type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical rating record was last updated */,
  "rating_deviation" REAL /* Rating deviation of the player for the specified period and game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the coach record was last updated */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_coaches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was last updated */,
  "team_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
